afterPayment.title: What happens after payment
steps: You receive a short business info form
Your site is ready in 3-5 days

faq.question: How do I know SiteForge is legitimate?
faq.answer: We only charge 50% upfront. The other 50% is due after you approve the finished site. You can review everything before final payment. Payment is processed securely through Stripe.

faq.question: Why is it only $497?
faq.answer: Because we use a streamlined build process and pre-built components. This lets us deliver professional websites much faster than traditional agencies – without the overhead of account managers, lengthy revisions and agency markups. You get the same result for a fraction of the price.

faq.question: Do I own the website after purchase?
faq.answer: Yes, 100%. You receive the complete backup file on delivery. You can host it anywhere – Netlify, Vercel, cPanel, or your own server. No lock-in, no ongoing fees owed to us.

faq.question: Can I use my own domain?
faq.answer: Absolutely. We build the site and hand you the files. You connect it to any domain you own. If you don't have one yet, we'll point you in the right direction.

faq.question: How long does it take?
faq.answer: 3 to 5 business days after we receive your information. You fill out a short form (takes about 5 minutes), and we handle everything from there.

faq.question: What information do you need from me?
faq.answer: Business name, services offered, contact details, and a few photos if you have them. It takes about 5 minutes to fill out the onboarding form we send after payment.

faq.question: Can I request edits after delivery?
faq.answer: Yes. Two rounds of edits are included at no extra cost. Additional revision rounds are available at a flat rate.

faq.question: Do you provide hosting?
faq.answer: Hosting isn't included in the $497. Many clients host for free on Netlify or through their domain provider. We also offer a $49/month Website Care Plan that includes hosting and ongoing support.

faq.question: Can I edit the website myself later?
faq.answer: The site is built with static HTML – you'd need a developer to make major changes. For small updates (phone number, hours, services), our $49/month Care Plan includes one change per month.

faq.question: What's included in the $497?
faq.answer: A 4-page website (Home, Services, About, Contact), mobile-friendly design, contact form, Google Maps integration, local SEO structure, and full backup files. Delivered in 3-5 business days.

cta.headline: Stop losing customers to competitors with better websites.
